revisions.reason: Format behavioral tests after plan lock
Capture implementation outcome after ready review
Rename legacy verify quietness test for clarity
Keep historical test artifact as non-collected compatibility shim
Apply repo-wide Black formatting before amended handoff
Update lock hash after shared CLI behavioral test gained scope-only worktree coverage
Add scope-only file-tracking verify regression to shared verify tests
